backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no backend logic; all content is static and client-side.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: hero section with parallax, content sections about Spider-Man, depth effects throughout, and Spider-Man themed visual design.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing components, hooks, and styling for the Spider-Man website.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles with CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component rendering Header, five content sections (Hero, Origin, Powers, Villains, Appearances), and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AppearancesSecti: Section displaying eight notable Spider-Man appearances across comics, films, and TV with categorized icons and color-coded depth cards.
frontend/src/components/DepthCard.tsx: Reusable card component with layered shadows, transforms, and hover effects for consistent 3D depth styling.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer with caffeine.ai attribution link, dynamic year, and Marvel copyright notice with web pattern background.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed header with Spider-Man branding, Sparkles icon with web pattern overlay, and red/blue color scheme.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with three parallax layers (city, web pattern, hero content) and animated scroll indicator.
frontend/src/components/OriginSection.ts: Three depth cards detailing Peter Parker's origin, Uncle Ben's death, and his transformation into Spider-Man.
frontend/src/components/PowersSection.ts: Grid of six depth cards showcasing Spider-Man's powers with icons, titles, and descriptions.
Displays a grid of Spider-Man villains with threat levels, using DepthCard components and color-coded threat badges (Extreme/High/Medium).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous actor for backend communication, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity management, and status tracking for ICP integration.
frontend/src/hooks/useParallax.ts: Custom hook that calculates parallax scroll offset using requestAnimationFrame for smooth depth effects based on scroll position.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty file placeholder indicating no backend queries are needed as all content is static and client-side rendered.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Spider-Man themed CSS variables (red/blue colors), comic book typography styles, layered depth shadow utilities, and glow effects using Tailwind layers.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider wrapper around the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme with Spider-Man color scheme (oklch colors), custom shadows, animations, and integrating typography/container-queries/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking Spider-Man website features including hero section with parallax, content sections, depth effects, and comic book visual theme with required image specifications.
